MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m0:Country {name: 'Bolivia'}),(n:Country)-[r1:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m1:Country {name: 'Paraguay'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.founding_date DESC LIMIT 1

MATCH (n:PoliticalParty)-[r0:foundedBy]->(m0:Politician {name: 'Maya Manolova'}),(n:PoliticalParty)-[r1:foundedBy]->(m1:Politician {name: 'Tatyana Doncheva'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.founding_date
MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m0:Country)-[r1:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m1:Country {name: 'Brazil'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
MATCH (n:PoliticalParty)-[r0:headedBy]->(m0:Politician)<-[r1:headedBy]-(m1:PoliticalParty {name: 'The Republicans'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.founding_date

MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(m0:Politician {name: 'Donald Tusk'}),(n:Country)<-[r1:operatesIn]-(m1:PoliticalParty {name: 'United People\'s Party'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.official_language

MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m0:Country)-[r1:memberOf]->(m1:InternationalOrganization {name: 'Inter-American Tropical Tuna Commission'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
MATCH (n:PoliticalParty)-[r0:operatesIn]->(m0:Country {name: 'Greece'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.founding_date DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (n:PoliticalParty)-[r0:operatesIn]->(m0:Country)-[r1:hasHeadOfState]->(m1:Politician {name: 'Sandro Pertini'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name
